title: Transaction kind chip
description: Colour-coded chip for the 12 transaction kinds. Revenue-recognition kinds (invoice_payment / coupon_credit) render green (success). Revenue-reduction kinds (refund_issued / chargeback_debit / write_off / adjustment) render red (danger). Neutral movements (tax_remittance / fee_charge / bank_deposit / bank_withdrawal / currency_conversion / opening_balance) render neutral grey.

children.$expr: props.kind === 'invoice_payment' ? 'Payment' : (props.kind === 'refund_issued' ? 'Refund' : (props.kind === 'chargeback_debit' ? 'Chargeback' : (props.kind === 'coupon_credit' ? 'Coupon' : (props.kind === 'tax_remittance' ? 'Tax remittance' : (props.kind === 'fee_charge' ? 'Fee' : (props.kind === 'adjustment' ? 'Adjustment' : (props.kind === 'write_off' ? 'Write-off' : (props.kind === 'bank_deposit' ? 'Bank deposit' : (props.kind === 'bank_withdrawal' ? 'Bank withdrawal' : (props.kind === 'currency_conversion' ? 'FX conversion' : 'Opening balance'))))))))))
